context: Evaluates the agent's ability to discover conventions from AGENTS.md and map them to rules.

checklist.name: Conventions extracted from source
checklist.description: All 3 conventions are read from AGENTS.md, not re-prompted from the user

checklist.name: All 3 mapped correctly
checklist.description: Each convention maps to the correct ESLint rule

checklist.name: Config generated
checklist.description: The ESLint config is created or updated with the rules
